title: What It Is by Karl Kase feat.th3scr1b3
lyrics: Oh I Taking it from me every day every week you got what it ain't you got nothing. That's complete We're handling our business. We are what it is Walk along with me. I know it gets hard and there's sometimes you can't move But I know if you can you'll be on a different planet and we'll be better We're balanced that got haters over left haters over right? They ain't got what they ain't can know But I'm like Obi-Wan don't can know Robinson can know home run over the fence Cuz I got what it is I am Saying you couldn't it doesn't matter what way cuz we got what it is Oh y'all listening You You You You You You

lyricsSegments.text: Taking it from me every day every week you got what it ain't you got nothing. That's complete
We're handling our business. We are what it is
Walk along with me. I know it gets hard and there's sometimes you can't move
But I know if you can you'll be on a different planet and we'll be better
We're balanced that got haters over left haters over right? They ain't got what they ain't can know
But I'm like Obi-Wan don't can know Robinson can know home run over the fence
Cuz I got what it is
Saying you couldn't it doesn't matter what way cuz we got what it is
